names.name: الرَّحْمَنُ
names.meaning: The One who has plenty of mercy for the believers and the blasphemers in this world and especially for the believers in the hereafter.

names.name: الرَّحِيمُ
names.meaning: The One who has plenty of mercy for the believers.

names.name: الْمَلِكُ
names.meaning: The Sovereign Lord, The One who has absolute ownership and authority over all creation.

names.name: الْقُدُّوسُ
names.meaning: The One who is pure from any imperfection and clear from children and adversaries.

names.name: السَّلاَمُ
names.meaning: The One who grants peace and calm to all creation.

names.name: الْمُؤْمِنُ
names.meaning: The One who grants safety and security to His creation.

names.name: الْمُهَيْمِنُ
names.meaning: The One who witnesses the saying and deeds of His creatures.

names.name: الْعَزِيزُ
names.meaning: The strong, the defeater who is not defeated.

names.name: الْجَبَّارُ
names.meaning: The One that nothing happens in His dominion except that which He willed.

names.name: الْمُتَكَبِّرُ
names.meaning: The Supreme, The One who is supremely great and above all creation.

names.name: الْخَالِقُ
names.meaning: The One who brings everything from non-existence to existence.

names.name: الْبَارِئُ
names.meaning: The Maker, The Creator who has the power to materialize and proportion His creation.

names.name: الْمُصَوِّرُ
names.meaning: The Fashioner, The One who forms His creatures in different shapes and forms.

names.name: الْغَفَّارُ
names.meaning: The One who forgives the sins of His slaves time and time again.

names.name: الْقَهَّارُ
names.meaning: The Subduer, The One who has perfect Power and absolute control over all things.

names.name: الْوَهَّابُ
names.meaning: The One who is Generous in giving plenty without any return.

names.name: الرَّزَّاقُ
names.meaning: The One who provides all the creatures their needs.

names.name: الْفَتَّاحُ
names.meaning: The One who opens for His slaves the closed worldly and religious matters.

names.name: اَلْعَلِيْمُ
names.meaning: The One nothing is absent from His knowledge.

names.name: الْقَابِضُ
names.meaning: The One who constricts the sustenance by His wisdom.

names.name: الْبَاسِطُ
names.meaning: The One who expands and widens.

names.name: الْخَافِضُ
names.meaning: The One who lowers whoever He willed by His Destruction.

names.name: الرَّافِعُ
names.meaning: The One who raises whoever He willed by His endowment.

names.name: الْمُعِزُّ
names.meaning: He gives esteem to whoever He willed, hence there is no one to degrade Him.

names.name: المُذِلُّ
names.meaning: The One who degrades whoever he willed, hence there is no one to give him esteem.

names.name: السَّمِيعُ
names.meaning: The One who Hears all things that are heard by His Eternal Hearing without an ear, instrument or organ.

names.name: الْبَصِيرُ
names.meaning: The One who Sees all things that are seen by His Eternal Seeing without a pupil or any other instrument.

names.name: الْحَكَمُ
names.meaning: The One who is the judge, the arbitrator, the One who has the complete authority to decide between the creatures.

names.name: الْعَدْلُ
names.meaning: The One who is entitled to do what He does.

names.name: اللَّطِيفُ
names.meaning: The One who is kind to His slaves and endows upon them.

names.name: الْخَبِيرُ
names.meaning: The One who knows the truth of things.

names.name: الْحَلِيمُ
names.meaning: The One who delays the punishment for those who deserve it and then He might forgive them.

names.name: الْعَظِيمُ
names.meaning: The One deserving the attributes of Exaltment, Glory, Extolement, and complete Majesty.

names.name: الْغَفُورُ
names.meaning: The One who forgives a lot.

names.name: الشَّكُورُ
names.meaning: The One who gives a lot of reward for a little obedience.

names.name: الْعَلِيُّ
names.meaning: The One who is clear from the attributes of the creatures.

names.name: الْكَبِيرُ
names.meaning: The One who is greater than everything in status.

names.name: الْحَفِيظُ
names.meaning: The One who protects whatever and whoever He willed to protect.

names.name: المُقيِت
names.meaning: The One who has the Power.

names.name: الْحسِيبُ
names.meaning: The One who gives the satisfaction.

names.name: الْجَلِيلُ
names.meaning: The One who is attributed with greatness of Power and Glory of status.

names.name: الْكَرِيمُ
names.meaning: The One who is clear from abjectness.

names.name: الرَّقِيبُ
names.meaning: The One that nothing is absent from Him.

names.name: الْمُجِيبُ
names.meaning: The One who answers the one in need if he asks Him and rescues the yearner if he calls upon Him.

names.name: الْوَاسِعُ
names.meaning: The Knowledgeable; The One nothing is absent from His knowledge.

names.name: الْحَكِيمُ
names.meaning: The One who is correct in His doings.

names.name: الْوَدُودُ
names.meaning: The One who loves His believing slaves and His believing slaves love Him.

names.name: الْمَجِيدُ
names.meaning: The One who is with perfect Power, High Status, Compassion, Generosity and Kindness.

names.name: الْبَاعِثُ
names.meaning: The One who resurrects His slaves after death for reward and/or punishment.

names.name: الشَّهِيدُ
names.meaning: The Witness, The One from whom nothing is hidden.

names.name: الْحَقُّ
names.meaning: The One who truly exists.

names.name: الْوَكِيلُ
names.meaning: The Trustee, The One who is relied upon for all affairs.

names.name: الْقَوِيُّ
names.meaning: The One with the complete Power.

names.name: الْمَتِينُ
names.meaning: The Firm, The One with steadfast power who never tires.

names.name: الْوَلِيُّ
names.meaning: The Protecting Friend, The One who supports and manages the affairs of His servants.

names.name: الْحَمِيدُ
names.meaning: The praised One who deserves to be praised.

names.name: الْمُحْصِي
names.meaning: The One who the count of things are known to him.

names.name: الْمُبْدِئُ
names.meaning: The One who started the human being. That is, He created him.

names.name: الْمُعِيدُ
names.meaning: The One who brings back the creatures after death.

names.name: الْمُحْيِي
names.meaning: The One who took out a living human from semen that does not have a soul.

names.name: اَلْمُمِيتُ
names.meaning: The One who renders the living dead.

names.name: الْحَيُّ
names.meaning: The One attributed with a life that is neither born nor is it coming to an end.

names.name: الْقَيُّومُ
names.meaning: The One who remains and does not end.

names.name: الْوَاجِدُ
names.meaning: The Rich who is never poor. Al-Wajd is Richness.

names.name: الْمَاجِدُ
names.meaning: The One who is Majid.

names.name: الْواحِدُ
names.meaning: The One without a partner.

names.name: اَلاَحَدُ
names.meaning: The One who is unique in His essence and attributes.

names.name: الصَّمَدُ
names.meaning: The Master who is relied upon in matters and reverted to in ones needs.

names.name: الْقَادِرُ
names.meaning: The One attributed with Power.

names.name: الْمُقْتَدِرُ
names.meaning: The One with the perfect Power that nothing is withheld from Him.

names.name: الْمُقَدِّمُ
names.meaning: The One who puts things in their right place. He makes ahead what He wills.

names.name: الْمُؤَخِّرُ
names.meaning: The One who puts things in their right place. He makes behind what He wills.

names.name: الأوَّلُ
names.meaning: The One whose Existence is without a beginning.

names.name: الآخِرُ
names.meaning: The One whose Existence is without an end.

names.name: الظَّاهِرُ
names.meaning: The One that nothing is above Him and nothing is underneath Him, hence He exists without a place.

names.name: الْبَاطِنُ
names.meaning: The One that nothing is above Him and nothing is underneath Him, hence He exists without a place.

names.name: الْوَالِي
names.meaning: The One who owns things and manages them.

names.name: الْمُتَعَالِي
names.meaning: The One who is clear from the attributes of the creation.

names.name: الْبَرُّ
names.meaning: The One who is kind to His creatures, who covered them with His sustenance and specified whoever He willed among them by His support, protection, and special mercy.

names.name: التَّوَابُ
names.meaning: The One who grants repentance to whoever He willed among His creatures and accepts his repentance.

names.name: الْمُنْتَقِمُ
names.meaning: The One who victoriously prevails over His enemies and punishes them for their sins.

names.name: العَفُوُّ
names.meaning: The One with wide forgiveness.

names.name: الرَّؤُوفُ
names.meaning: The One with extreme Mercy. The Mercy of Allah is His will to endow upon whoever He willed among His creatures.

names.name: مَالِكُ الْمُلْكِ
names.meaning: The One who controls the Dominion and gives dominion to whoever He willed.

names.name: ذُوالْجَلاَلِ وَالإكْرَامِ
names.transliteration: Dhu Al Jalaali Wa Al Ikraam
names.meaning: The One who deserves to be Exalted and not denied.

names.name: الْمُقْسِطُ
names.meaning: The One who is Just in His judgment.

names.name: الْجَامِعُ
names.meaning: The One who gathers the creatures on a day that there is no doubt about, that is the Day of Judgment.

names.name: الْغَنِيُّ
names.meaning: The One who does not need the creation.

names.name: الْمُغْنِي
names.meaning: The One who satisfies the necessities of the creatures.

names.name: اَلْمَانِعُ
names.meaning: The Supporter who protects and gives victory to His pious believers.

names.name: الضَّارَّ
names.meaning: The One who makes harm reach to whoever He willed and benefit to whoever He willed.

names.name: النَّافِعُ
names.meaning: The One who gives benefit to whoever He willed.

names.name: النُّورُ
names.meaning: The One who guides.

names.name: الْهَادِي
names.meaning: The One who guides.

names.name: الْبَدِيعُ
names.meaning: The One who created the creation and formed it without any preceding example.

names.name: اَلْبَاقِي
names.meaning: The One that the state of non-existence is impossible for Him.

names.name: الْوَارِثُ
names.meaning: The One whose Existence remains.

names.name: الرَّشِيدُ
names.meaning: The One who guides.

names.name: الصَّبُورُ
names.meaning: The One who does not quickly punish the sinners.

data.title: The Beautiful Names of Allah
data.description: An overview of the 99 Names (Attributes) of Allah as recognized in Islamic tradition.
data.recitation_benefits: Reciting and understanding these names brings one closer to Allah and is a means of worship and remembrance (dhikr)
data.hadith: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) said: "Allah has ninety-nine names, one hundred minus one. Whoever memorizes them will enter Paradise." (Bukhari 2736 and Muslim 2677)
